LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MAINTAINED ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION PER CCP 437C(P)(1). THE COURT OVERRULES DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE SALVO DECLARATION. SHE DEMONSTRATES PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE AND THE ATTACHED DOCUMENTS MEET THE BUSINESS RECORDS EXCEPTION TO THE HEARSAY RULE. (EVID. COD SEC. 1271.) DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE AN OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT AND THAT ALONE IS GROUNDS TO GRANT THIS MOTION. (CCP 437C(B)(3).) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Set For Case Management Conference On Sep-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gail Jackosn, Esq. 714-443-0713 specially appearing for Defendant Nathaniel Minami.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Ms. Jackson argues. The Court states it did not receive an email contesting the tentative ruling, therefore the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt. Summary Adjudication

Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment is granted. Plaintiff maintained its burden of production per CCP 437c(p)(1). The court overrules defendant's objections to the Salvo declaration. She demonstrates personal knowledge and the attached documents meet the business records exception to the hearsay rule. (Evid. Cod sec. 1271.) Defendant's declaration fails to create a triable issue of fact. In addition, defendant failed to provide an opposing separate statement and that alone is grounds to grant this motion. (CCP 437c(b)(3).)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Set For Trial On Jul-03-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
